title: Popup
body: ## The QoL Services Inc. Team proudly presents their latest and greatest new mod, the **Popup Mod™** The **Popup Mod™** is a one of a kind mod that presents the player with annoying, screen-blocking popup ads that give you a new feel of appreciation when playing Minecraft. Using our patented random ad technology you will get new and exciting ads with a nice relaxing notification sound that may or may not confuse you into thinking that you got a real notification from an app like Discord, Twitter or Skype. We strive to create new ways of enjoying Minecraft and that's why we created multiple different types of ads to keep the experience fun and unique. Now compatible with Flashbang Mod!
